ItacPersonItem.Notes: Portrait from Antonio Bruni, La Selva di Parnaso, 1615. Appointed censor of the Umoristi Academy in 1623; in 1631 he delivered the presentation `Sulle passioni dell`animo, quali siano piu` efficaci ad esprimerle o le lacrime o i sospiri`.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
